race.comment: OAKFIELD ALASKA (6) comes here at the right time third-up with decisive wins on the country tracks. Sharp debut winner two-back, then up in trip when he picked them up effortlessly for a game win over 1450m at Muswellbrook. Maps well and goes close here. OLYMPIAN (1) classy gelding who looks well placed in this company despite drawing out. No luck in the Carbine two-back, then jumped in trip with a struggling seventh over 2000m in the G3 Frank Packer Plate at Randwick. Can win this with the right run. WHATELEY (4) up in class when he chipped away late to finish eighth over 1400m at Randwick. Stays in the mix despite drawing out. CLASSIC TOUCH (13) holding her form in easier company and will roll forward with the winkers coming off. Exotic player. WEST HEAD (5) handy gelding not to be overlooked with the claim. Kept up to the mark with an 860m trial win and the visors go on.
